name: BB:UBA : Detect WannaCry Using IP
notes: This building block looks for IP addresses in the UBA : Malware Activity WannaCry - IP reference set. Any known IP addresses related to WannaCry should be added to this table.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Detect WannaCry Using IP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when any of Source IP, Destination IP are contained in any of UBA : Malware Activity WannaCry - IP's - IP
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Detect WannaCry Using IP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when any of Source IP, Destination IP are contained in any of UBA : Malware Activity WannaCry - IP's - IP
